property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Faculty.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: validStudentIenStatus
property.label: Student Individual Enrollment Statuses
property.description: Students with these statuses will be displayed in the grading table. For multiple statuses, separate each one with ; e.g. Enrolled;Completed. The status should match the reduivy__Enrollment_Status__c picklist option API value.

property.name: validStudentIsnStatus
property.label: Student Individual Session Enrollment Statuses
property.description: (Only applies to Study Sessions) Students with these statuses will be displayed in the grading table. For multiple statuses, separate each one with ; e.g. Enrolled;Completed. The status should match the reduivy__Enrollment_Status__c picklist option API value.

property.name: showSaveButton
property.label: Show Save Button
property.description: Shows the Save button.

property.name: saveButtonIgdStatus
property.label: Save Button Status
property.description: Status given to all Individual Enrollment Grade records when clicking the Save button.

property.name: showSaveAndSubmitButton
property.label: Show Save and Submit Button
property.description: Shows the Save and Submit button.

property.name: saveAndSubmitButtonIgdStatus
property.label: Save and Submit Button Status
property.description: Status given to all Individual Enrollment Grade records when clicking the Save and Submit button.

property.name: individualEnrollmentGradeFieldSet
property.label: Individual Enrollment Grade Field Set
property.description: Individual Enrollment Grade field set API name for extra fields to edit.

property.name: individualGradeItemNotesFieldSetName
property.label: Grading Note Field Set Name
property.description: The individual grade item field set API name for grading notes.

property.name: contactTileInfoFields
property.label: Contact Tile Info Fields
property.description: The contact tile info fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: contactImageUrlFieldName
property.label: Contact Image Url Field Name
property.description: The contact field API name that stores the image url. This will take precendence if this and Contact Image File Name is defined.

property.name: contactImageFileName
property.label: Contact Image File Name
property.description: The text to find the contact profile image file name using CONTAINS.

property.name: contactTileClickAction
property.label: Contact Tile Click Action
property.description: The action when clicking on contact tile title. Supported options are: None, View Info, View Record.

property.name: infoModalFieldsForContact
property.label: Contact Info Popup Fields
property.description: The contact info popup fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: infoModalSectionNameForContact
property.label: Contact Info Section Name
property.description: The contact info popup section name.

property.name: showRecordsBasedOnAllocation
property.label: Show Records Based On Allocation
property.description: After enabling this checkbox, the wizard will display the study offerings and study sessions based on the faculty's allocation which is the study event relation for faculty's individual session enrollment.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for the current object. e.g. {!recordId}.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Current Object API Name
property.description: API Name of the current object e.g., {!objectApiName} or reduivy__Study_Session__c.

property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Faculty.

property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: listingIconName
property.label: Listing Icon Name
property.description: Study Offering and Study Session listing icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: validStudentIenStatus
property.label: Student Individual Enrollment Statuses
property.description: Students with these statuses will be displayed in the grading table. For multiple statuses, separate each one with ; e.g. Enrolled;Completed. The status should match the reduivy__Enrollment_Status__c picklist option API value.

property.name: validStudentIsnStatus
property.label: Student Individual Session Enrollment Statuses
property.description: (Only applies to Study Sessions) Students with these statuses will be displayed in the grading table. For multiple statuses, separate each one with ; e.g. Enrolled;Completed. The status should match the reduivy__Enrollment_Status__c picklist option API value.

property.name: validFacultyIenStatus
property.label: Faculty Individual Enrollment Statuses
property.description: Displays listings if the Faculty user has these statuses. For multiple statuses, separate each one with ; e.g. Enrolled;Completed. The status should match the reduivy__Enrollment_Status__c picklist option API value.

property.name: validFacultyIsnStatus
property.label: Faculty Individual Session Enrollment Statuses
property.description: (Only applies to Study Sessions) Displays listings if the Faculty user has these statuses. For multiple statuses, separate each one with ; e.g. Enrolled;Completed. The status should match the reduivy__Enrollment_Status__c picklist option API value.

property.name: sofListingNameField
property.label: Study Offering Listing Name Field
property.description: The Name for field to display for Study Offering listings.

property.name: sofListingInfoFields
property.label: Study Offering Listing Info Fields
property.description: The info fields to display for Study Offering listings in a semi-colon separated list e.g. Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: sseListingNameField
property.label: Study Session Listing Name Field
property.description: The Name for field to display for Study Session listings.

property.name: sseListingInfoFields
property.label: Study Session Listing Info Fields
property.description: The info fields to display for Study Session listings in a semi-colon separated list e.g. Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: showNoGradeWarning
property.label: Show No Grade Warning
property.description: Show warning when no grades have been marked yet.

property.name: noGradeWarningText
property.label: No Grade Warning Text
property.description: The warning for when no grades have been marked.

property.name: noGradeWarningIcon
property.label: No Grade Warning Icon
property.description: The icon name for when no grades have been marked. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: noGradeWarningIconVariant
property.label: No Grade Warning Icon Variant
property.description: The icon variant/colour for when no grades have been marked.

property.name: showSaveButton
property.label: Show Save Button
property.description: Shows the Save button.

property.name: saveButtonIgdStatus
property.label: Save Button Status
property.description: Status given to all Individual Enrollment Grade records when clicking the Save button.

property.name: showSaveAndSubmitButton
property.label: Show Save and Submit Button
property.description: Shows the Save and Submit button.

property.name: saveAndSubmitButtonIgdStatus
property.label: Save and Submit Button Status
property.description: Status given to all Individual Enrollment Grade records when clicking the Save and Submit button.

property.name: individualEnrollmentGradeFieldSet
property.label: Individual Enrollment Grade Field Set
property.description: Individual Enrollment Grade field set API name for extra fields to edit.

property.name: individualGradeItemNotesFieldSetName
property.label: Grading Note Field Set Name
property.description: The individual grade item field set API name for grading notes.

property.name: contactTileInfoFields
property.label: Contact Tile Info Fields
property.description: The contact tile info fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: contactImageUrlFieldName
property.label: Contact Image Url Field Name
property.description: The contact field API name that stores the image url. This will take precendence if this and Contact Image File Name is defined.

property.name: contactImageFileName
property.label: Contact Image File Name
property.description: The text to find the contact profile image file name using CONTAINS.

property.name: contactTileClickAction
property.label: Contact Tile Click Action
property.description: The action when clicking on contact tile title. Supported options are: None, View Info, View Record.

property.name: infoModalFieldsForContact
property.label: Contact Info Popup Fields
property.description: The contact info popup fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: infoModalSectionNameForContact
property.label: Contact Info Section Name
property.description: The contact info popup section name.

property.name: showRecordsBasedOnAllocation
property.label: Show Records Based On Allocation
property.description: After enabling this checkbox, the wizard will display the study offerings and study sessions based on the faculty's allocation which is the study event relation for faculty's individual session enrollment.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.
